title: Physical, Service, and Performance Troubleshooting
description: Resolve a multi-symptom campus incident across cabling, interfaces, switching, routing, addressing, wireless, and application performance. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of an evidence-backed incident resolution packet while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Diagnose physical and interface counters before replacing devices blindly.
Trace switching, routing, addressing, and service dependencies.
Separate bandwidth, throughput, latency, loss, jitter, congestion, and wireless causes.
